tags.name: Veterinary Records
tags.description: API for managing veterinary records of a horse

get.description: Returns a paginated list of horses with the ability to apply filters such as price, age, breed, location, and verification status.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

400.description: Invalid filter parameters (e.g., invalid price or age range)

post.description: Creates a new horse in the system.

get.description: Returns all veterinary records associated with a specific horse.

post.description: Creates a new veterinary record for a specific horse. Only the owner or an admin can perform this action.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific horse by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a horse by marking it as deleted.

get.summary: Get a veterinary record by ID
get.description: Returns a specific veterinary record by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a veterinary record. Only the owner or an admin can perform this action.

patch.description: Updates an existing veterinary record. Only the owner or an admin can perform this action.

get.summary: Get conversation history between buyer and horse owner
Test endpoint to verify authentication is working

CreateHorseDTO.description: DTO for creating a new horse

imageIds.description: List of Cloudinary image public IDs

sold.description: Indicates if the horse is sold

UpdateHorseDTO.description: DTO for partially updating a horse (PATCH)
